action.reasoning: Observation: Pipeline works end-to-end. 3 epochs gave val AP=0.108. Training is ~19s/epoch + 162s data loading. Analysis: Need much longer training. Standard ogbg-molpcba GIN-VN reaches ~0.27 AP. With ~5.7h left, I can run 50+ epochs comfortably. Decision: Train 50 epochs with same config but add a learning rate scheduler. Keep batch_size=512, emb_dim=300.
